name: Section 1244 Ordinary Loss Deduction

eligibility.description: Stock must be in a domestic 'small business corporation' (capitalization <$1M) issued for money or property. The corporation must meet a gross receipts test (active business) for the 5 years preceding the loss.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows individuals to treat losses from the sale or worthlessness of small business stock as ordinary losses rather than capital losses, up to $50,000 (or $100,000 for joint returns) per year.
